name: FctsIdsWorkCompClmCntBal

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.T1_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompClmCntBal; SELECT bal.SRC_SYS_CD, clm.SRC_SYS_CD AS TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD, clm.CLM_ID AS TRGT_CLM_ID, bal.CLM_ID INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.T1_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompClmCntBal FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_WorkCompOwner}.WORK_COMPNSTN_CLM clm FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_WorkCompOwner}.B_WORK_COMPNSTN_CLM bal ON clm.SRC_SYS_CD = bal.SRC_SYS_CD AND clm.CLM_ID = bal.CLM_ID WHERE clm.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle}; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.T2_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompClmCntBal; SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_CLM_ID, CLM_ID INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.T2_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompClmCntBal FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.T1_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompClmCntBal WHERE TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD IS NULL OR SRC_SYS_CD IS NULL OR CLM_ID IS NULL OR TRGT_CLM_ID IS NULL; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.T3_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompClmCntBal; IF (@{pipeline().parameters.ToleranceCd} = 'OUT') BEGIN SELECT 'ROW COUNT BALANCING FACETS - IDS WORKERS COMP CLM OUT OF TOLERANCE' AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.T3_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompClmCntBal; END ELSE BEGIN SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.T3_TMP_FctsIdsWorkCompClmCntBal WHERE 1=0; END
